rationale: In the citing paper, Zhu and Ratner (2015) appears only in a grouped list of prior variety-seeking references when introducing the general concept of variety seeking. The paper does not discuss that study's scarcity-polarization mechanism, findings, or implications in its theory development. There is no visible reuse of its measures, design logic, or interpretation in the hypotheses or empirical tests. This indicates a background mention rather than a meaningful functional dependency.
